---
description: Human-Owned Source of Truth
applyTo: '**/*'
---

## Human-Owned Source of Truth

Before planning, implementing, or reviewing work, consult the human-owned source of truth at `.docs/master-plan.md`.

Treat `.docs/master-plan.md` as the primary governing document for scope, constraints, priorities, and intended outcomes.

When making changes:

- align all work with `.docs/master-plan.md`
- do not contradict or override decisions recorded in `.docs/master-plan.md`
- use agent-generated planning or tracking artifacts only as supporting execution artifacts, not as the main source of truth
- if implementation details conflict with `.docs/master-plan.md`, follow `.docs/master-plan.md`
